name: SilverSPAC Inc. Unit
summary: SilverSPAC Inc. Unit consists of one Class A ordinary share and one-half of one redeemable warrant. SilverSPAC Inc. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The unit trades under the ticker SLVRU until the components separate.
